testcase.name: test_p2p_presence_propagation

failure.message: AssertionError: Presence from dev_eb05e95a not found in dev_fa836387 peers assert False

testcase.failure:
p2p_repos = (WindowsPath('C:/Users/galh2/AppData/Local/Temp/pytest-of-galh2/pytest-841/test_p2p_presence_propagation0/repo1'), WindowsPath('C:/Users/galh2/AppData/Local/Temp/pytest-of-galh2/pytest-841/test_p2p_presence_propagation0/repo2'))
def test_p2p_presence_propagation(p2p_repos): r1, r2 = p2p_repos e1 = P2PEngine(r1 / ".deep") e2 = P2PEngine(r2 / ".deep")
# Needs keys to sign and verify beacons from deep.core.user import UserManager from deep.core.security import KeyManager um1 = UserManager(r1 / ".deep") um1.add_user("user1", "key1", "user1@deep.local") km1 = KeyManager(r1 / ".deep") km1.generate_key()
um2 = UserManager(r2 / ".deep") um2.add_user("user2", "key2", "user2@deep.local") km2 = KeyManager(r2 / ".deep") km2.generate_key()
e1.start() e2.start()
try: # Update presence on e1 e1.update_presence("main.py", 42)
# Wait for discovery (beaconing) timeout = 10 found = False start = time.time() while time.time() - start < timeout: peers = e2.get_peers() for p in peers: if p.node_id == e1.node_id: if e1.node_id in p.presence: pres = p.presence[e1.node_id] if isinstance(pres, dict) and pres.get("file") == "main.py": found = True break if found: break time.sleep(0.5)
> assert found, f"Presence from {e1.node_id} not found in {e2.node_id} peers" E AssertionError: Presence from dev_eb05e95a not found in dev_fa836387 peers E assert False
tests\test_p2p_collab.py:65: AssertionError
